calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Brandon Yee, Esq. 510-839-5200 Burris Nisenbaum Curry & Lacy for Plaintiff.
Adrienne Demonet, Esq. 424-302-6996 Office of the City Attorney for Defendant CCSF. (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

The Court gives preliminary comments;
Ms. Demontes submits to the Court's ruling except for "The court declines to take judicial notice of Defendant's Exhibit B." counsel contests and presents arguments.
Mr. Yee requests to deny the request and uphold the tentative ruling.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco (CCSF)'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
